summary: Initialized Next.js 14 App Router project via create-next-app, installed all required packages (poker-ts, pokersolver, drizzle-orm, @neondatabase/serverless, drizzle-kit, next-auth@beta, bcryptjs, framer-motion, tailwindcss). Note: @types/pokersolver does not exist on npm; created local types/pokersolver.d.ts declaration file instead. Configured Tailwind CSS (included in create-next-app setup). Created .env.local with placeholder keys (gitignored). Created drizzle.config.ts pointing to lib/db/schema.ts with postgresql dialect. tsconfig.json already has @/* path alias from create-next-app.
